title: BlissKeyBinds
description: This is a fabric mod that helps people who have my plugin BlissGems to use abilities easier and set the keybinds for them
body:
# BlissGems Fabric                                          
                                                                                                  
  A lightweight client-side companion mod for the BlissGems server plugin. Adds fully configurable
   keybinds to trigger gem abilities and utility commands — no more typing in chat.

  What does it do?

  BlissGems Fabric lets you bind hotkeys to your gem abilities and utility commands. Press a key,
  and the mod sends the corresponding /bliss command to the server. All keybinds are rebindable in
   Options > Controls.

  Default Keybinds

  Abilities

  - V — Primary Ability
  - R — Secondary Ability
  - G — Tertiary Ability
  - X — Quaternary Ability

  Utility

  - Y — Pockets
  - Z — Amplify
  - H — Toggle Auto-Smelt
  - N — View Souls
  - K — Release Souls

  Additional commands (Gem Info, Check Energy, Toggle Click Abilities, Withdraw Energy Bottle) are
   registered but unbound by default — bind them to whatever you like.

  Requirements

  - Minecraft 1.21.1+
  - Fabric Loader
  - Fabric API

  Server Compatibility

  This mod requires a server running the BlissGems plugin. It is purely client-side — it sends
  commands that the server plugin handles. It does nothing on servers without BlissGems installed.
